programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: A secret from Flanders' past is revealed; a never-before-seen room in the Simpson home.

programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: It is revealed that Chief Wiggum's wife is more than she seems; Marge takes part in a jewel heist.

programs.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programs.desc: To celebrate his 12th birthday, Eddie plans a secret party at the mall with his friends. In other events, Emery and Evan seek attention from their parents by purposely misbehaving.

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: While closing the deal on a must-have neon Chevy sign in Alabama, Mike and Jersey go hog wild for a pricey barn-fresh Shelby Mustang.

programs.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programs.desc: Eyewitness footage captures the moment a tornado tears through the town of Moore, Oklahoma, destroying two schools with the pupils still inside.

programs.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programs.desc: Faced with the threat of a shut down in the swamp, the team focuses their energy on the Money Pit and are euphoric when they find more gold, with evidence suggesting it's of Spanish origin.
